title: senecio bampsianus
intro: Senecio bampsianus is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with its roots and leaves containing pyrrolizidine alkaloids (PAs), which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio bampsianus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat certain skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal use, although its preparation and consumption should be approached with caution due to the presence of potentially toxic compounds.
